nodes.label: Jacques Route - Autumn Forest Path
nodes.author: jacques
nodes.description: Landscape photography of a winding dirt road through an autumn forest. Warm orange, red, and yellow foliage on both sides, soft misty light in the background. Serene, painterly mood with rich fall colors.

nodes.label: Adelouve Renard Cute - Sleeping Fox
nodes.author: adelouve
nodes.description: Wildlife close-up photography of a young red fox curled up asleep on a rocky surface. Soft green bokeh background with foliage. Warm orange fur, peaceful and endearing mood.

nodes.label: Aline Chouette - Owl Close-Up
nodes.author: aline
nodes.description: Dramatic close-up portrait of a great horned owl face against a near-black background. Striking orange-red eyes, detailed feather texture. Dark, intense, and mysterious mood.

nodes.label: Pochettes - Colorful Book Covers Still Life
nodes.description: Still life photograph of colorful folder-like book covers (pink, yellow, light blue, green) fanned out, with a copy of Bertrand Russell's 'Histoire de la Philosophie Occidentale' (Les Belles Lettres edition) placed on top. Clean, flat-lay style with neutral background.
nodes.norm_label: pochettes - colorful book covers still life

nodes.label: Goat - Male Portrait
nodes.author: goat
nodes.description: Head-and-shoulders portrait photograph of a middle-aged man with short dark hair, slight stubble, wearing a dark jacket. Neutral light background. Casual, ID-style or profile photo mood.
